cards.name: 9 of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: rewarded efforts, success, achievement, independence, leisure, material security, self-sufficiency

cards.name: King of Wands, reversed
cards.interpretation: forceful, domineering, tyrant, vicious, powerless, ineffective, weak leader

cards.name: 9 of Wands, reversed
cards.interpretation: stubbornness, rigidity, defensiveness, refusing compromise, giving up
